role_bindings_user_org_uq.name: role_bindings_user_org_uq
role_bindings_user_org_uq.where: "role_bindings"."user_id" is not null and "role_bindings"."repository_id" is null

role_bindings_token_org_uq.name: role_bindings_token_org_uq
role_bindings_token_org_uq.where: "role_bindings"."token_id" is not null and "role_bindings"."repository_id" is null
